step_rationale: Marker of lipid peroxidation in atherosclerotic plaque and vascular inflammation.
mechanism: 8-isoprostane is a stable F2-isoprostane generated by oxidative modification of arachidonic acid in inflamed plaque and dysfunctional endothelium.

references.title: Prediction of myocardial infarction, stroke and cardiovascular mortality with urinary biomarkers of oxidative stress: Results from a large cohort study.
